title: spinacia oleracea var. tetrandra
intro: Spinacia oleracea var. tetrandra, also known as tetrandrous spinach, is a variant of the spinach plant with four stamens. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of tetrandrous spinach include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting eye health due to its rich content of lutein and zeaxanthin. Tetrandrous spinach can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and capsules, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
